race.comment: JUST GLAMOUROUS (2) returned from a break last start and sat on the speed before lifting to score over 1200m at this track by a head. Adam Hyeronimus who has two wins when partnering stays on. Expecting a bold showing. LOERA (13) followed up on her game debut at Rosehill when too good at Canterbury last start. Returned good figures in the process and looms as a major threat. RAJWA (12) caught the eye last start over 1250m at Canterbury, coming from well back to finish a long neck from the winner in second. Is going well this campaign, recording a win and two minor placings from four starts. Best form too good to ignore. PERFECT PICTURE (6) was a gutsy winner two back then ran fourth over 1200m at Sandown-Lakeside on April 6. Settles back early but winds up late. Will prove tough to beat.
